title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the ICICI Bank International Enterprises family as a Investment Banker in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
